legacy.content:
# Phase 45-01 Plan: Grid and First-Person Refit Completion
## Objective
Finish scene parity on top of the atomic library so no primary gameplay scene depends on ad hoc panel code.
## Tasks
1. Add template-level scene wrappers for common title/shell/footer composition. 2. Remove remaining scene-local duplicated layout values where equivalents exist in primitives. 3. Standardize button labels across first-person/grid scenes (Controls, Bag, Journal, Combat, Magic Lab). 4. Unify right-panel content rules per scene (Room Brief + contextual log). 5. Document scene-template contracts in `ARCHITECTURE.md` and `KAPLAY-INTERFACE-SPEC.md`.
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir packages/kaplay-demo run typecheck` - `pnpm --dir packages/kaplay-demo run build`
